title: Radical Candor
subtitle: Be a Kick-Ass Boss Without Losing Your Humanity
author: Kim Malone Scott
themes: The Radical Candor quadrant framework: Care Personally + Challenge Directly
Four quadrants: Radical Candor, Ruinous Empathy, Obnoxious Aggression, Manipulative Insincerity
Giving feedback without being a jerk
Listening as the primary feedback skill
Building trust as a prerequisite to candor
Roadblocks to candor and how to overcome them
Care personally, challenge directly as the core managerial practice
excerpt: The best thing you can do to boost your career is to radiate candor — to challenge directly and care personally at the same time.
